summary: Iteration 64: Post-Parity-Audit Testing Complete. All 12 P0 bug fixes validated. 24/24 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI removals verified (Pricing, Vision, War Room, Go-Live Health, Directory). All critical endpoints working including giving export (StreamingResponse), giving settings (RBAC), prayer dashboard (PRAYER_CATEGORIES), SolomonPay transactions, payment methods, and portal features.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - minor rendering issue, charts still display correctly

p0_bug_fixes_validated.4_payment_processors_import: VERIFIED - Giving settings include processor info
p0_bug_fixes_validated.5_get_session_token_from_request: VERIFIED - payments.py, platform.py, portal.py, public_api.py all working
p0_bug_fixes_validated.6_get_current_portal_user: VERIFIED - payments.py, public_api.py, admin_comms.py all working

critical_code_review_comments: All 12 P0 bug fixes from parity audit validated and working
StreamingResponse import in admin_giving.py - CSV export working
PRAYER_CATEGORIES defined in admin_comms.py - prayer dashboard working
get_session_token_from_request and get_current_portal_user imports fixed across 5 files
Rate limiting active (5 attempts per IP per 60 seconds) - tests use session reuse
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 validated all 12 P0 bug fixes from the parity audit. Key findings: (1) All endpoints working after import fixes (StreamingResponse, PAYMENT_PROCESSORS, get_session_token_from_request, get_current_portal_user, PRAYER_CATEGORIES, ROOT_DIR), (2) RBAC permissions correctly enforced for giving endpoints, (3) All UI removals verified (Pricing, Vision, War Room, Go-Live Health, Directory), (4) Rate limiting active - wait 65+ seconds between test batches or use session reuse. MOCKED: Twilio SMS (stubbed), Stripe (test keys), Physical printers (mocked).
